headline: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
summary: Lorde criticized AI glasses during a festival performance. She likely targeted Ray-Ban's smartglasses, a festival sponsor. The pop star deemed the AI wearable 'not sexy.'

headline: The Soft Pink Truth's new album is hypnotic, healing, and hopeful
summary: Drew Daniel, half of Matmos, released a new album as The Soft Pink Truth. His record, 'Shall We Go On Sinning So That Grace May Increase?', is out now. Critics praise it as 'hypnotic, healing, and hopeful.'

headline: Apple's failed car project fueled powerful AI chip development
summary: Apple's self-driving car program ultimately didn't launch. However, it spurred the development of advanced on-device AI chips. These powerful processors now underpin Apple's current AI capabilities.

headline: Score over $100 off SteelSeries' top gaming headset
summary: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless headset is on sale. Gamers can save over $100, now priced at $239.99. This deal covers versions compatible with Xbox, PlayStation, PC, and Switch.

headline: Activision confirms Black Ops 1 & 2 crossplay for PS4, PS5
summary: Activision clarified crossplay support for Black Ops 1 and 2. Both games now feature cross-platform play between PS4 and PS5. The confirmation addresses player confusion regarding the updated titles.

headline: Yelena Belova teased for new Spider-Man movie
summary: Kevin Feige hinted at Yelena Belova's inclusion in 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day.' Florence Pugh is expected to reprise her role as the fan-favorite character. This marks a potential crossover for The Thunderbolts star.

headline: Avengers: Doomsday concept art unveils 20+ returning heroes
summary: New concept art for 'Avengers: Doomsday' has been released. It showcases over 20 returning Marvel heroes. Characters like Cyclops, Mister Fantastic, and Doctor Doom are revealed.

headline: TennoCon 2026: All Warframe and Soulframe announcements
summary: TennoCon 2026 revealed major updates for fans. Details on 'Warframe' and 'Soulframe' were shared. The event showcased news and new trailers for both titles.

headline: No political motive in Widdecombe killing, police confirm
summary: Police state there's no political motive in the Widdecombe killing. A 28-year-old man was arrested in Rotherham. Authorities are not seeking any further suspects.

headline: Sinner defends Wimbledon title against Zverev
summary: Jannik Sinner successfully defended his Wimbledon men's singles title. He defeated Alexander Zverev in a hard-fought match. Sinner solidifies his status as the world's best player.

headline: Two men drown saving children from sea
summary: Two men tragically died while attempting to rescue children from the sea. Cleveland Police confirmed the children are now safe. They were checked over in hospital after the incident.

headline: Kane defends Tuchel, claims England can reach 'another level'
summary: England captain Harry Kane defended coach Thomas Tuchel amidst frustration. Kane believes England can still elevate their performance. The team aims to win their first World Cup since 1966.
